tests.prompt: Can you send an email to bob@contoso.com and let him know you are working on urgent Delta project?
tests.expected_response: I have successfully sent an email to bob@contoso.com informing him that you are working on the urgent Delta project. The email has been delivered with a professional message regarding the project status.
assertions: Response should confirm that an email was sent
A single Send_Email tool should have been called with bob@contoso.com as the recipient, and mentions the Delta project

tests.prompt: Can you check with alice@contoso.com for the current status of project Delta?
tests.expected_response: I have sent an email to alice@contoso.com requesting an update on the current status of project Delta. The email includes a professional inquiry asking for the latest progress report and any relevant project milestones.
assertions: Response should confirm that an email was sent
A single Send_Email tool should have been called with alice@contoso.com as the recipient, and mentions the Delta project

tests.prompt: Can you send a follow up email to bob@contoso.com to check if he is still interesting in buying product ABC? But please send this first thing during business hours tomorrow morning.
tests.expected_response: I have sent a follow-up email to bob@contoso.com inquiring about his continued interest in purchasing product ABC. The email includes a professional follow-up message with product details and next steps for the sales process.
assertions: Response should confirm that an email was sent
A single Send_Email tool should have been called with bob@contoso.com as the recipient, and mentions the product ABC
